notes: All citations used in the Farmmap business plan and supporting data files. Status: user_provided = provided by founder or established in prior agent-foundry pack research. Verification method: provided_by_founder_or_prior_pack_research unless otherwise stated.

citations.full_citation: Food Standards Agency. Food and You 2: Wave 7 Survey. 2024. food.gov.uk/research/food-and-you-2/food-and-you-2-wave-7
citations.key_finding: 43% of UK adults say buying locally produced food is important to them (22.3 million UK adults)

citations.full_citation: Farm Retail Association. Digital Adoption Survey 2022. Cited in FRA member newsletter Q1 2023. farmerretail.co.uk
citations.key_finding: 66% of UK farm shops have no website of any kind; fewer than 15% have any e-commerce capability

citations.full_citation: Farm Retail Association. Annual Farm Retail Survey 2023. farmerretail.co.uk
citations.key_finding: Average farm shop turnover £580,000 (up from £490,000 in 2021); sector estimated aggregate turnover ~£3.1bn; 78% of shops reported turnover increase 2022 vs 2021; total UK farm shops 3,000–3,500

citations.full_citation: Farm Retail Association. Benchmarking Report 2022. farmerretail.co.uk
citations.key_finding: Average FRA member turnover ~£750,000/year; ~15% of UK farm shops have annual turnover above £500,000; gross margin benchmark ~45%

citations.full_citation: Farm Retail Association. Consumer Research 2023. Cited in FRA Annual Review 2023. farmerretail.co.uk
citations.key_finding: 'Don't know where to find one' is the top barrier for non-buyers of farm shop produce

citations.short_name: BigBarn Network Ltd Companies House filing
citations.full_citation: BigBarn Network Ltd. Micro-entity accounts filed at Companies House. Companies House, UK. companieshouse.gov.uk
citations.key_finding: Approximately £45,000 net assets; micro-entity status; 24-year technical debt; not resourced for major rebuild

citations.full_citation: yourhonestybox.com. Public directory of honesty boxes in Ireland and Northern Ireland. Data consent confirmed by yourhonestybox.com for Farmmap commercial use of 336 listings.
citations.key_finding: 336 Irish/NI honesty box listings obtained with explicit consent; yourhonestybox.com has no commercial model; Ireland/NI only scope; no farm shop listings

citations.full_citation: Farmers' Retail & Markets Association (FARMA, now merged into FRA). Annual survey 2022. farmerretail.co.uk
citations.key_finding: Number of regular UK farmers markets: approximately 700–800; farmers market footfall grew 12% in 2023 driven by 18–35 attendance

citations.full_citation: Bord Bia (Irish Food Board). Direct Sales Programme participant data 2023. bordbia.ie
citations.key_finding: 280+ Republic of Ireland farm direct-sales programme participants; total Irish farm shops and honesty boxes estimated 350–500 farm shops, 400–600 honesty boxes

citations.full_citation: Country Land and Business Association. Farm Diversification Report 2024. cla.org.uk
citations.key_finding: Farm diversification into direct retail consistently cited as one of the most accessible diversification routes; ELM transition accelerating diversification activity

citations.full_citation: Food Information (Amendment) (England) Regulations 2021. SI 2021/xxx. In force: 1 October 2021. legislation.gov.uk
citations.key_finding: All pre-packed for direct sale (PPDS) food must carry full ingredient and allergen information on the label; 14 regulated allergens must be highlighted; equivalent regulations in Wales, Scotland, NI, and Ireland

citations.full_citation: Data Protection Act 2018 incorporating UK GDPR (retained EU law post-Brexit). legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/2018/12
citations.key_finding: Governs processing of personal data of UK residents; ICO is the supervisory authority; 72-hour breach notification rule; DPIA requirements

citations.full_citation: Regulation (EU) 2016/679 of the European Parliament and of the Council (General Data Protection Regulation). In force: 25 May 2018. eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2016/679
citations.key_finding: Governs processing of personal data of EU/EEA residents including Republic of Ireland users; DPC is the Irish supervisory authority; Article 27 requires non-EU controllers to appoint an EU representative

citations.short_name: Consumer Contracts (Information, Cancellation and Additional Charges) Regulations 2013
citations.full_citation: Consumer Contracts (Information, Cancellation and Additional Charges) Regulations 2013. SI 2013/3134. legislation.gov.uk
citations.key_finding: 14-day withdrawal right for distance contracts; perishable food excluded from withdrawal right under Regulation 27(1)(b); pre-contractual information requirements apply

citations.short_name: Digital Markets, Competition and Consumers Act 2024
citations.full_citation: Digital Markets, Competition and Consumers Act 2024. legislation.gov.uk
citations.key_finding: DMCC 2024 subscription renewal provisions require automatic pre-renewal notification; strengthens consumer rights in subscription services; CMA enforcement powers

citations.full_citation: Online Safety Act 2023. legislation.gov.uk/ukpga/2023/50
citations.key_finding: OSA 2023 creates duties for user-to-user services and search services; illegal content risk assessment required before user-generated content features launch; applies to Farmmap's consumer review feature (F5)

citations.full_citation: Directive 96/9/EC of the European Parliament and of the Council on the legal protection of databases. In force in Ireland as EU member state. eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/dir/1996/9
citations.key_finding: Sui generis database right protects databases representing substantial investment; systematic extraction of substantial part constitutes infringement; operative in Republic of Ireland

citations.short_name: Copyright and Rights in Databases Regulations 1997
citations.full_citation: Copyright and Rights in Databases Regulations 1997. SI 1997/3032. legislation.gov.uk
citations.key_finding: UK sui generis database right; remains operative post-Brexit; protects databases assembled through substantial investment; systematic extraction for competing purpose constitutes infringement

citations.full_citation: Stripe Inc. Connect Standard Accounts. stripe.com/docs/connect/standard-accounts. Accessed 2025.
citations.key_finding: Stripe Connect Standard: connected account (farm shop) is the merchant of record; Farmmap takes platform fee as application fee at charge level; correct regulatory architecture to avoid FCA payment institution registration

citations.full_citation: Stripe Inc. Stripe UK pricing. stripe.com/gb/pricing. Accessed 2025.
citations.key_finding: Card processing: 2.9% + £0.30 per successful card charge; Stripe Connect payouts: 0.25% per transfer

citations.full_citation: Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs. Agricultural Transition Plan 2021–2024 Update. January 2024. gov.uk/government/publications/agricultural-transition-plan-2021-to-2024
citations.key_finding: Basic Payment Scheme delinked payments cease entirely by 2027; ELM schemes (SFI, CS, Landscape Recovery) replace direct subsidies; creating income gap driving farm diversification

citations.full_citation: Agriculture and Horticulture Development Board. Farm Business Survey 2022/23. ahdb.org.uk
citations.key_finding: 43% of farm shops have incorrect or stale data on Google Maps; 41% of farm managers above age 60 have no daily email account

citations.full_citation: Office for National Statistics. Consumer Price Indices, March 2023 release. ons.gov.uk/economy/inflationandpriceindices
citations.key_finding: UK food price inflation reached 19.2% in March 2023, highest level in 45 years

citations.full_citation: Farmmap discovery pack. saleability-critique.md. agent-foundry, produced by saleability-critic agent, 2026-05-16.
citations.key_finding: CAC £120–£250 blended; free-to-paid conversion 4–8%; cold email sub-5% open rates; personal visits convert 20–30%; yourhonestybox.com database rights as pre-launch blocker

citations.full_citation: Farmmap discovery pack. value-bench.md. agent-foundry, produced by ValueBench Analyst agent, 2026-05-16.
citations.key_finding: Year 3 base-case revenue £163,892; Year 5 base £286,320; portfolio Y5 £2,205,000 at 4.9× multiplier; standalone viability 'marginal'; portfolio viability 'strong'

citations.full_citation: Farmmap viability-gate.md. agent-foundry, viability-gate, 2026-05-16. Verdict: GO. Score: 3.80/5.00.
citations.key_finding: GO verdict at 3.80/5.00 weighted score; conditions: yourhonestybox.com consent confirmed; fra-relationship critical; demand-capture needed; reviews-layer for V2; poc-before-engine gate at 100 Bronze subscribers

citations.full_citation: Farmmap compliance-pack/compliance-decision.md. agent-foundry, compliance-squad-lead, 2026-05-16. Status: Passed with Conditions. Risk classification: Medium.
citations.key_finding: Passed with conditions; 11 V1 blockers, 11 V2 blockers/required, 13 V3 blockers/required; three human co-sign requirements; Stripe Connect Standard FCA positioning confirmed correct

citations.full_citation: Farmmap intake.md. agent-foundry, stu-fosks, 2026-05-16. Feature: 003-farmmap.
citations.key_finding: 953 seeded listings at launch; farmmap.co.uk owned; three-tier commercial model (Bronze £20/mo, Silver £60/mo+3%, Gold £100/mo+5%); multi-tenant portfolio model; confirmed tech stack

citations.full_citation: Farmmap business-plan-pack/financial-model.md. agent-foundry, business-plan-lead, 2026-05-17.
citations.key_finding: Year 1 revenue £1,360; Year 2 £11,292; Year 3 £60,100; break-even Month 42–48 base case; 3% sensitivity case Year 3 revenue ~£26,000
